coaching_cards.title: Empathize with the Customer
coaching_cards.content: I understand how frustrating this situation can be. Let me help you resolve this issue as quickly as possible.

coaching_cards.title: Clarify the Customer's Issue
coaching_cards.content: Could you please provide me with your order ID or the registered contact number so I can check the status of your order?

coaching_cards.title: Check for Order Status
coaching_cards.content: Ensure to check the order status in Shopify using the provided order ID or contact number to provide accurate information to the customer.

coaching_cards.title: Order Status Check Procedure
coaching_cards.content: Refer to the SOP guidelines on how to check order status in Shopify. Make sure to click on the tracking number for detailed information.
